unverified_claims.note: Estimated from combined 'AI dubbing' + 'AI video translation' + 'AI localization' query volumes. Not verified via Google Keyword Planner. Actual combined volume may be higher (120K+) or reflect different query formulations.

Estimated from AI video dubbing market growing from ~$5-10M (2021) to $1.5B+ (2026). Different research firms define market scope differently — narrow AI video dubbing vs broader AI localization software. Conservative estimate based on IntelMarketResearch 44.4% CAGR applied over 5 years (~6.5x = +550%) and sector-wide evidence of near-zero baseline in 2021.
unverified_claims.suggested_replacement: '+550%' is more defensible using the compounded CAGR math
